World.headline: US Halts Iran Maritime Trade, Intercepts Oil Tankers in Hormuz Strait
World.summary: The U.S. has initiated a naval blockade to halt economic trade in and out of Iran by sea, with a U.S. Navy destroyer already intercepting two oil tankers attempting to leave the Strait of Hormuz. Science.headline: What Are Aircraft Boneyards and Why Do Thousands of Planes Sit Abandoned?
Science.summary: Aircraft boneyards are vast storage facilities where thousands of planes sit abandoned, primarily due to retirement, economic downturns, or long-term maintenance needs. These unique sites, often in arid climates, offer optimal conditions for preserving aircraft for potential future use or parts reclamation.
key_points: Aircraft boneyards are storage sites for thousands of abandoned planes.
Reasons for storage include retirement, economics, or maintenance.
Arid climates are ideal for preserving aircraft.

Health.headline: Lancet Study Warns Fatty Liver Cases to Surge to 1.8 Billion by 2050

This alarming forecast highlights a major public health challenge driven by lifestyle factors and rising obesity rates, necessitating urgent preventive strategies.

Health.headline: NASA Probes Space's Impact on Astronaut Bodies After Artemis II Mission

Health.headline: Study Finds AI Fails Primary Diagnosis Over 80% of the Time
